parsed_review.summary:
CP00-857 (risk A, 10 units, RP28.P04.M05.S17-RP28.P04.M06.S04) is a descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace UI fixture transition pack (production_ready_flag marketplace_ui_fixture_transition_descriptor_verified). I independently inspected the source via Read/Grep/Glob and confirm the descriptor-only production_ready claim is supported.

Implementation verified: MARKETPLACE_CP857_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:258) matches baseline/manifest (upstream CP00-856, next CP00-858/RP28.P04.M06.S05). MARKETPLACE_CP857_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:1000) deliverable_counts {claude_review:1,hermes_evidence:1,implementation:3,test:1,ui:4} and micro_title {Permission And Audit Binding:6,Synthetic Fixture Set:4} match the pack baseline; required_section_rows resolve to M05=6 rows (Build smoke, Hermes UI evidence, Claude UI leak prompt, Closeout handoff, State snapshot, No unauthorized count leak) and M06=4 rows (UI surface inventory, Data dependency map, Loading state, Empty state) = 10. The shared createRow builder (registry.js:1145) stamps every row descriptor_only=true with all runtime/write/leak flags false; ROW_EXTRAS add positive guards (unauthorized_count_leak_prevented=true, state_snapshot runtime_state_read=false/product_state_written=false, runtime_rendered=false). Hermes packet (registry.js:1475) emits_runtime_receipt=false/writes_product_state=false/no_real_data=true; Claude packet (registry.js:1632) read_only=true/promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; closeout handoff runtime_opening_allowed=false/human_final_approval_required=true. Descriptor (registry.js:2109) spreads MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (all false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false).

Boundaries enforced: validateMarketplaceCp857UiFixtureTransitionDescriptor (validators.js:1555) checks per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution/no connector-secret/oauth/prompt-completion/real-data/permission-detail/audit-body, rejects any runtime opening or permission/audit/product-state write, and validates Hermes/Claude/handoff/model/contract drift. Contract JSON validation.valid=true with latest_pack_id/plan_pack_id CP00-857 and no_write_attestation all false; all materialized cp857 rows are descriptor-only. Tests (model.test.js:492-525) cover CP857 binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor, and current-contract projection.

Authority boundary respected: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer and NOT final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false throughout); Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling, not embedded product runtime. The pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so blocks_goal_closeout=false. Hardening: auth_preflight passed (readiness-report.json exit 0, valid JSON); the placeholder claude-review-result.json (0-byte/pending) is the empty pre-review slot this receipt fills, not a submitted invalid review.

Provenance caveat: source was directly inspected, but command exit codes (rp28:marketplace:validate=0, model tests=0) are agent-reported in command-evidence.json and not personally re-executed under this read-only role. The manifest/command-evidence/inspection/adjudication remain in expected pre-promotion (in_progress/PENDING_REVIEW) state; this review is the gate that unblocks adjudication. Actual production_ready promotion still requires the full validation suite (closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, weighted/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane, git diff --check) passing green plus human final approval, which are outside this review receipt. No P0/P1 review-blocking defects found.

findings.title: changed-file-scope dual-lists new-session-handoff.md as both pack-implementation and unrelated-dirty
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appears simultaneously in untracked_implementation_files (line 155) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 162). These classifications are mutually exclusive in intent, so the scope generator is double-counting this untracked doc. It is a planning handoff doc, not a CP00-857 deliverable.
findings.recommendation: Tighten the scope-generation classifier so a file is assigned to exactly one bucket; new-session-handoff.md should be classified only as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking. Closeout integrity is unaffected: the file is not in active_pack_required_untracked_files (only docs/closeout-packs/cp00-857 is) and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so no active pack file is dropped. Does not block pack or goal closeout.
